_schema_note: Human review of PyMuPDF4LLM output (pymupdf4llm 1.27.2.3) on the same 28 asset ids reviewed for AksharaMD Phase 1. Each verdict is on PyMuPDF4LLM's OWN document.md, not AksharaMD's — the tool differs. Enum: usable | usable_with_minor_defects | materially_damaged | unusable. Evidence cites observed extraction quality, output chars, and any structural issue.

parsebench/3colpres.evidence: 4188 chars; extracts magazine headline + body sections. Column order reads plausibly on inspection; some fragmentation but not the interleaved sentence-splicing seen in AksharaMD's output.

parsebench/elpais.evidence: 4036 chars but Spanish accents are garbled: 'EL PA?S' instead of 'EL PAÍS'. Also 'S?BADO', 'A?o' — character encoding failure on Latin-1 supplement. Reading order plausible on inspection.

parsebench/simple2.evidence: 4394 chars; extracts European Fund evaluation cleanly. Section headings preserved; body text flows correctly.

parsebench/2colmercedes.evidence: 3737 chars; audit-report body extracted with section headings preserved; column order correct.

parsebench/battery.evidence: 2551 chars; safety-warning content extracted with lettered list preserved (a/b/c bullets); heading '## CAUSE BATTERY EXPLOSION' rendered correctly.

parsebench/eastbaytimes.evidence: Single-column news article extracted cleanly; byline + body preserved.

parsebench/strikeUnderline.evidence: 7772 chars, LARGER than AksharaMD output. Preserves strikethrough markup as '~~text~~' — semantic markup is retained. Body content readable; markdown fidelity higher than AksharaMD on this asset.

parsebench/text_dense__de.evidence: German dense-text extracted; layout not fully verified at review DPI, similar to AksharaMD's review.

parsebench/letter3.evidence: **0 chars extracted** — PyMuPDF4LLM has no OCR; image-only UK Home Office letter produces empty output. AksharaMD Marker OCR delivered 2353 chars on this asset.

parsebench/myctophidae.evidence: **0 chars extracted** — no OCR; scientific-taxonomy image plate produces empty output. AksharaMD Marker delivered 2431 chars.

parsebench/japanese_case.evidence: **0 chars extracted** — no OCR; Japanese magazine image produces empty output. AksharaMD Marker delivered 991 chars of Japanese.

parsebench/ikea3.evidence: 5285 chars but content appears interleaved between columns similar to AksharaMD: 'Ideas Styles Shop at IKEA Here we have gathered lots of Creating a certain style in Here we have gathered lots'. Magazine layout defeats simple x-sort.

public/001-trivial/minimal-document.pdf.evidence: 598 chars; Lorem Ipsum body extracted verbatim.

public/004-pdflatex-4-pages/pdflatex-4-p.evidence: 14491 chars; 4-page LaTeX doc extracted with content per page preserved.

public/026-latex-multicolumn/multicolumn.evidence: 7168 chars; two-column LaTeX document extracted with section structure preserved. Same result as AksharaMD (both preserve the body).

public/003-pdflatex-image/pdflatex-image.evidence: Image caption text extracted; image itself referenced as 'picture intentionally omitted'.

public/007-imagemagick-images/imagemagic.evidence: **0 chars** — single image page; no OCR.
**0 chars** — single image page; no OCR.
**0 chars** — single image page; no OCR.

public/008-reportlab-inline-image/inline.evidence: 62 chars; near-empty output with only a placeholder.

public/018-base64-image/base64image.pdf.evidence: Caption text extracted; image referenced with placeholder.

public/019-grayscale-image/grayscale-ima.evidence: **0 chars** — single grayscale image; no OCR.

public/023-cmyk-image/cmyk-image.pdf.evidence: **0 chars** — single CMYK image; no OCR.

public/028-image-references-deduplicatio.evidence: Content-poor multi-page image references PDF; small text extracted, most content lost.

public/015-arabic/habibi.pdf.evidence: 28 chars — 'habibi' + Arabic letters partially extracted but with garbled/duplicated ordering. Reading order for Arabic RTL is broken.

public/017-unreadable-meta-data/unreadab.evidence: **Execution failure** — PyMuPDF4LLM raises IndexError on this PDF. AksharaMD parses it (usable_with_minor_defects).

public/010-pdflatex-forms/pdflatex-forms.evidence: 22 chars — near-empty output. Form field text not preserved. AksharaMD delivered 63 chars on this asset.

public/012-libreoffice-form/libreoffice-.evidence: 135 chars — sparse content. Static text partially extracted; form structure lost.
